Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import cv2
from ocr_engine import ocr_headline

images = [
    '/private/tmp/claude-501/test_headline_photo_2026-05-11 22.18.42.jpeg',
    '/private/tmp/claude-501/test_headline_photo_2026-05-11 22.18.32.jpeg',
    '/private/tmp/claude-501/test_headline_photo_2026-05-11 22.18.26.jpeg',
]

for img_path in images:
    crop = cv2.imread\(img_path\)
    print\(f'圖片: {img_path.split\(\\"/\\"\)[-1]}'\)
    text = ocr_headline\(crop\)
    print\(f'  OCR: {text}'\)
    print\(\)
")

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import cv2, base64, requests, json

crop = cv2.imread\('/private/tmp/claude-501/test_headline_photo_2026-05-11 22.18.42.jpeg'\)
crop = cv2.resize\(crop, \(512, 75\)\)
_, buffer = cv2.imencode\('.jpg', crop, [cv2.IMWRITE_JPEG_QUALITY, 85]\)
b64 = base64.b64encode\(buffer\).decode\('utf-8'\)

payload = {
    'model': 'gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf',
    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': [
        {'type': 'text', 'text': '請辨識圖片中的所有文字，只輸出文字內容'},
        {'type': 'image_url', 'image_url': {'url': f'data:image/jpeg;base64,{b64}'}}
    ]}],
    'max_tokens': 800,
    'temperature': 0.1
}

resp = requests.post\('http://192.168.0.242:8081/v1/chat/completions', json=payload, timeout=300\)
data = resp.json\(\)
msg = data['choices'][0]['message']
print\('content:', repr\(msg.get\('content', ''\)\)\)
print\(\)
print\('reasoning_content:', repr\(msg.get\('reasoning_content', ''\)\)[:500]\)
")

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import cv2, base64, requests

crop = cv2.imread\('/private/tmp/claude-501/test_headline_photo_2026-05-11 22.18.32.jpeg'\)
crop = cv2.resize\(crop, \(512, 75\)\)
_, buffer = cv2.imencode\('.jpg', crop, [cv2.IMWRITE_JPEG_QUALITY, 85]\)
b64 = base64.b64encode\(buffer\).decode\('utf-8'\)

payload = {
    'model': 'gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf',
    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': [
        {'type': 'text', 'text': '請辨識圖片中的所有文字，只輸出文字內容'},
        {'type': 'image_url', 'image_url': {'url': f'data:image/jpeg;base64,{b64}'}}
    ]}],
    'max_tokens': 1500,
    'temperature': 0.1
}

resp = requests.post\('http://192.168.0.242:8081/v1/chat/completions', json=payload, timeout=300\)
data = resp.json\(\)
msg = data['choices'][0]['message']
print\('content:', repr\(msg.get\('content', ''\)\)\)
print\('reasoning len:', len\(msg.get\('reasoning_content', ''\)\)\)
print\('finish_reason:', data['choices'][0].get\('finish_reason'\)\)
print\('total_tokens:', data.get\('usage',{}\).get\('total_tokens'\)\)
")

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import cv2
from stream import StreamReader
from detector import crop_roi, detect_yellow_region

reader = StreamReader\('https://www.youtube.com/live/AEBeWMM1atA?si=2FK3jfOGq9CpOa5C'\)
frame = reader.read_frame\(\)
roi = crop_roi\(frame\)
headline_crop, bbox = detect_yellow_region\(roi\)

cv2.imwrite\('/private/tmp/claude-501/live_frame.png', frame\)
if headline_crop is not None:
    cv2.imwrite\('/private/tmp/claude-501/live_headline.png', headline_crop\)
reader.release\(\)
print\('done'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(source venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import cv2, time
from stream import get_stream_url

url = get_stream_url\('https://www.youtube.com/live/AEBeWMM1atA?si=2FK3jfOGq9CpOa5C'\)
print\('Opening stream...'\)
cap = cv2.VideoCapture\(url\)
print\(f'Opened: {cap.isOpened\(\)}'\)

for i in range\(3\):
    ret, frame = cap.read\(\)
    print\(f'Frame {i+1}: ret={ret}, shape={frame.shape if ret else None}'\)
    time.sleep\(0.5\)

cap.release\(\)
print\('Done'\)
" 2>&1)

cap = cv2.VideoCapture\(url\)

" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(curl -s "https://pkgs.tailscale.com/stable/?mode=json" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
# DS925+ uses AMD Ryzen \(x86_64\), DSM 7
for t in data.get\('tarballs', {}\):
    if 'synology' in t.lower\(\) or 'spk' in t.lower\(\):
        print\(t\)
" 2>/dev/null || echo "JSON parse failed, trying alternate approach")
